SEARCH
Package com.monkey.mcbot.api.managers

Interface IBotRegistry

public interface IBotRegistry
Read-only registry view for currently active bots.

This interface is intended for inspection and monitoring use-cases. Mutation operations are exposed through IBotManager.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Map<UUID,BotSnapshot>
    getAllBots()
    Returns a snapshot map of all active bots.
    Optional<BotSnapshot>
    getBot(UUID ownerUUID)
    Returns the bot snapshot for a specific owner.
    Optional<UUID>
    getBotUUID(UUID ownerUUID)
    Returns the runtime bot entity UUID for the given owner.
    boolean
    isBotSpawned(UUID ownerUUID)
    Checks whether a bot exists for the provided owner.
    int
    size()
    Returns the number of tracked active bots.

  • Method Details

    • getAllBots

      Map<UUID,BotSnapshot> getAllBots()
      Returns a snapshot map of all active bots.
      Returns:
      immutable or defensive-copied map keyed by owner UUID

    • getBot

      Optional<BotSnapshot> getBot(UUID ownerUUID)
      Returns the bot snapshot for a specific owner.
      Parameters:
      ownerUUID - owner UUID
      Returns:
      snapshot when present, otherwise empty

    • getBotUUID

      Optional<UUID> getBotUUID(UUID ownerUUID)
      Returns the runtime bot entity UUID for the given owner.
      Parameters:
      ownerUUID - owner UUID
      Returns:
      bot UUID when present, otherwise empty

    • isBotSpawned

      boolean isBotSpawned(UUID ownerUUID)
      Checks whether a bot exists for the provided owner.
      Parameters:
      ownerUUID - owner UUID
      Returns:
      true if a bot is currently tracked

    • size

      int size()
      Returns the number of tracked active bots.
      Returns:
      registry size
